data.title: Johnson Outdoors Shares Slide After Q4 Earnings Miss, Hit By Market Challenges And Lower Margins
data.description: JOUT shares fell after reporting Q4 results. Sales grew but missed expectations, gross margin decreased due to discounts & product mix.

data.title: Spotlight on Alphabet: Analyzing the Surge in Options Activity
Dow Falls 150 Points; Oracle Posts Downbeat Results
What's Going On With C3.AI Stock Tuesday?
data.description: C3.AI reported second-quarter revenue of $93.34 million, beating analyst estimates of $91.02 million, according to Benzinga Pro. The company reported a quarterly loss of 6 cents per share, beating analyst estimates for a loss of 16 cents per share.

data.title: Why Is Cancer-Focused Chimerix Stock Trading Higher On Tuesday?
data.description: Chimerix plans to submit an NDA for dordaviprone to treat H3 K27M-mutant glioma, with potential U.S. FDA approval targeted for late 2025.
